items.situation: a student asking library staff about a delayed interlibrary loan

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I requested a book through interlibrary loan last week, but it still hasn't arrived. Could you check on it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, let me look. It says the book shipped from a partner library on Tuesday, so it should be here by Friday.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, that's cutting it close. My research paper is due Monday morning.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: If you're worried, we actually have an e-book version you can read right now through the library portal.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? That would solve everything. How do I find it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Just search the title in the catalog and click the online access link. You'll need to log in with your student ID.

questions.stem: What does the man suggest the woman do?

options.A: Borrow a copy from a partner library
options.B: Access an electronic version through the portal
options.C: Wait until the book arrives on Friday
options.D: Submit a new interlibrary loan request

questions.explanation: 男生建议她现在就通过图书馆门户阅读电子书版本，所以B正确。A、C、D都不是男生给出的建议，属于话题相关但未陈述的干扰项。

questions.stem: Why is the woman concerned about the delivery time?

options.A: Her library account is about to expire
options.B: The partner library is closing for a holiday
options.C: She needs the book before a Monday deadline
options.D: She has already paid a late fee

questions.explanation: 女生说她的研究论文周一早上要交，担心周五才到太赶，所以C正确。A、B、D都没有在对话中提到，属于过度推断或无关信息。

items.situation: two students discussing a relocated group-project meeting

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hey, did you hear our project meeting got moved out of the usual room in Carver Hall?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: No, I didn't. Where are we supposed to go now?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: They booked us a study room on the third floor of the library instead, room 304.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, that actually works better for me. It's closer to my afternoon lab.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Same here. Just remember the library rooms lock automatically, so we'll need someone's student ID to get in.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good point. I'll bring mine and message the group so nobody shows up at the old room.

questions.stem: Where will the project meeting now take place?

options.A: In a study room in the library
options.B: In their usual room in Carver Hall
options.C: In a lab on the third floor
options.D: In the group leader's dorm room

questions.explanation: 男生说他们订了图书馆三楼的304自习室，所以A正确。B是原来的房间，C混淆了楼层与实验室，D对话中没有提到。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Reserve a different room for the group
options.B: Notify the group about the new location
options.C: Ask a professor to unlock the room
options.D: Cancel the meeting for the afternoon

questions.explanation: 女生说她会给小组发消息，免得有人去错旧房间，所以B正确。A、C、D都与她说的话不符，属于过度推断。

items.situation: a student asking dining services about changing a meal plan

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Excuse me, I'd like to switch from the unlimited meal plan to the smaller weekly one. Is that possible?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It is, but plan changes are only processed during the first two weeks of the semester.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh no, have I already missed the window? Classes started three weeks ago.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Unfortunately, yes. The next chance to change will be at the start of spring term.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's frustrating. The unlimited plan is really more than I need.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I understand. For now, you could add guest passes to your account so the extra meals don't go to waste.

questions.stem: Why can't the woman change her meal plan right now?

options.A: The change period has already ended
options.B: She has not paid her tuition balance
options.C: The smaller plan is fully booked
options.D: Her student account has been frozen

questions.explanation: 男生说套餐更改只在学期前两周办理，而开学已经三周，所以更改窗口已过，A正确。B、C、D都没有在对话中出现。

questions.stem: What does the man suggest as a temporary solution?

options.A: Requesting a refund for unused meals
options.B: Switching to the plan next semester
options.C: Adding guest passes to her account
options.D: Speaking with the dining hall manager

questions.explanation: 男生建议她暂时把客人餐券加到账户上，免得多余的餐食浪费，所以C正确。B是下学期才能正式换套餐，不是临时方案；A、D对话中没有提到。
